request_payload.exposure_text: As a retired military strategist, I've seen firsthand how our over-reliance on foreign tech puts national security at risk. Strategic autonomy isn't just about being self-sufficient—it's about ensuring our civil liberties and preparedness aren't held hostage by geopolitical tensions. Trust me, this isn't about isolation; it's about smart, pragmatic security. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
